calendar.matters:
Petition For Order To Redress Breach Of Trust, Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee, And Appoint Replacement Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Proof Of Transfer Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Case Transferred

Petition For Order To Redress Breach Of Trust, Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee, And Appoint Replacement Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TRANSFER to MARIN County
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phil Foster for and with Rosario Legasto (petitioner).
Rick Franceschini appeared by zoom for and with Eric Ketchum (trustee) by zoom.

The parties presented oral argument to support their positions regarding venue. Further discussion was held regarding the trust history, the interactions between the trustee and the decedent's spouse, the trustee's attempt to buyout the spouse, the trustee having withheld the income and principal from the spouse, the trustee showing up unannounced, the trustee having had all of the utilities turned off while the spouse was residing in the marital home, the marital home being under construction since 2021, the spouse being the only person entitled to benefit from the marital trust, the trustee having no right to the marital assets, the large amounts of funds ($410,140.00) that were removed from the marital trust by the trustee to pay for his personal legal fees involving a personal law suit as well as other large amounts of funds ($460,000.00) that were removed from the marital trust to pay the trustee's attorney, the trustee's intent to distribute $826,000.00 from the marital trust to himself and to his brother, the issue of breach of trust and breach of fiduciary duty, etc. The Petition to Transfer Venue to Marin County is under submission. The Petition for Order to Redress Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to September 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Belen. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TRANSFER to MARIN County
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Redress Breach Of Trust, Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee, And Appoint Replacement Trustee
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-06-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Redress Breach Of Trust, Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee, And Appoint Replacement Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Continued To Jul-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Redress Breach Of Trust, Suspend And Remove Successor Trustee, And Appoint Replacement Trustee
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phil Foster appeared by zoom for Rosario Legasto (petitioner).

Mr. Foster stated that he has not heard from Eric, but that he had been in contact with his attorney Rick Franceschini, that it is not like the attorney to not be here today and asked that the matter be put over. An order to show cause and an order to appear will be issued to Eric Smith Ketchum to appear on June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show why he should not be removed as successor trustee. The Petition for Order to Redress Breach of Trust, etc. is also continued to June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
